_doc: Machine form of departments/podcast/procedural-graph.md. Validated by factory/graphs.py. Derives from knowledge/concept-map.md (LOCKED 2026-07-22). Watchdog department: read-only sensing lanes + propose-only heal lane; no external dispatch, no CRM writes, no model-capable nodes (C14).

untraced_allowed.runtime/kernel_bridge.py: factory-standard kernel wiring, not a graph node
untraced_allowed.runtime/estate.json: sensed-inventory data consumed by SG-WATCHDOG N1 (sense_estate.py); configuration, not behavior
untraced_allowed.runtime/playbooks.json: versioned heal allowlist data consumed by SG-HEAL N1 (heal_select.py); owner-reviewed data, not behavior
untraced_allowed.runtime/podcast_daily.sh: factory-standard daily trigger (department_daily.sh.template instance), shadow-only; invokes graph nodes, is not one
